title: Handle Dynamic Content
description: Learn to handle dynamically loaded content and AJAX responses
objectives: Wait for dynamic content to load
Detect and wait for DOM changes
instructions:
Write tests that:
1. Wait for dynamic content loaded via AJAX
2. Handle content that appears after a delay
3. Work with infinite scroll lists
4. Detect when new elements are added to DOM
5. Verify lazy-loaded content

    pass

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_dynamic_content(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/dynamic-loading/2')
    
    page.click('button:has-text("Start")')
    
    # Wait for loading to finish and content to appear
    page.wait_for_selector('#finish', state='visible', timeout=10000)
    
    result = page.locator('#finish')
    expect(result).to_contain_text('Hello World!')
    
    # Test dynamic table
    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/tables')
    page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle')
    
    table_rows = page.locator('table tbody tr')
    row_count = table_rows.count()
    assert row_count > 0

hints: Set appropriate timeouts for slow loading content
Use waitForResponse to wait for specific API calls
Check element count changes for infinite scroll

testCases.name: Handle network idle
testCases.expectedBehavior: Wait for all network requests to complete
